topics.name: Classes
topics.description: Blueprints for creating objects with defined properties and methods

topics.name: Objects
topics.description: Instances of classes containing actual data and methods

topics.name: Inheritance
topics.description: Creating new classes that inherit properties from existing classes

topics.name: Encapsulation
topics.description: Bundling data and methods within a class while hiding internal details

topics.name: Polymorphism
topics.description: Objects taking many forms through method overriding and interfaces

topics.name: Abstraction
topics.description: Hiding complex implementation details while exposing only necessary features

topics.name: Attributes
topics.description: Variables that belong to a class or object

topics.name: Methods
topics.description: Functions defined within a class that operate on objects
